Iran retaliates with missile + drone barrage on Israel, US bases, Gulf states
Iran announces Strait of Hormuz closure; 21+ merchant ship attacks begin

India Petroleum Min. Puri: 70% of crude imports already shifted off Hormuz
India cuts petrol excise ₹13→₹3, diesel ₹10→0; govt denies lockdown
IEA OMR: global supply down 10.1 mb/d to 97 mb/d — largest disruption in history
Iran declares full Hormuz closure after ceasefire talks stall
Trump extends ceasefire with Iran; US naval blockade of Iranian ports continues
Iran seizes 2 ships (MSC Francesca, Epaminondas) mid-ceasefire
Iran strikes hit UAE, Kuwait, Lebanon oil infra despite ceasefire

prediction_markets.primary_source_block_reason: Polymarket and Kalshi are regulatory-blocked from Indian ISPs (RBI / MeitY restrictions on real-money prediction markets). We surface equivalent prediction-market data from Manifold Markets, which is accessible and tracks the same underlying questions.
